spokeo.notes: Paste the URL of your Spokeo listing and a confirmation email; Spokeo emails a removal link to click.

whitepages.notes: Find your listing, submit the suppression request, then confirm via an automated phone call.

beenverified.notes: Search for your record, select it, and confirm the opt-out via an email link.

intelius.notes: Submit name and location, then confirm via an emailed link. Operated by PeopleConnect.

radaris.notes: Locate your profile, request control of it, then complete removal from the privacy page.

mylife.notes: MyLife processes removals via a CCPA request; email the privacy address with your listing URL.

acxiom.notes: Acxiom is a marketing-data broker; the opt-out form suppresses your record from its data products.

peoplefinders.notes: Search, select your record, and confirm the opt-out via the emailed link.
